form.formComment: Suited by inside box. Last start finished last in a Grade 5 on April 5 over 366m at this track behind On The Whisper beaten 10 lengths (20.56). Has performed below expectations at his last couple but is capable of far better.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at Sandown (30.54) in a Grade 5, finishing a 11 length seventh. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and two minors. Looks a key chance on best form.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Just been plugging away and needs to improve after being unplaced in six tries. Last start 4th over 300m at Q Straight. Happy to risk this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Just been plugging away and needs to improve after being unplaced in six tries. Last start 4th over 300m at Q Straight. Happy to risk this time.

form.formComment: Form has been solid with minor placings at his last three starts. Last time out finished 3rd in a Mix 5 on April 1 over 350m at Q Straight behind Better Call beaten 0.8 lengths (19.21). Happy enough to dismiss in this field.

form.formComment: Lines up from box 5 for the first time after finishing a 7 length sixth at Q Lakeside (20.36) in a P5. Others appear better placed.

form.formComment: Has finished eighth at his last couple of starts, most recently at this track over 366m. Not keen, needs to lift.

form.formComment: Has shown little speed out of the boxes and tends to spot them a start in her races, The latest effort was a 4.5 lengths sixth over 366m at this track. Better off looking to others.

form.formComment: Last start finished fourth on March 29 over 520m at Q Parklands behind Shamrock Hayze, beaten 17 lengths (30.83) in a Grade 3/4. Will find this a little easier. Has the ability to be in the finish.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 2nd on March 25 over 366m at this track behind Jimary Bob beaten 4.5 lengths (20.04) in a P5. Has clocked an outstanding 19.75 Best Time here at the trip. Top chance.
